summary: Tested PPTX slide generation overhaul - Backend API returns proper slides_data with varied layouts and contextual imageKeywords. Frontend Studio page loads correctly with all 9 tools. Slide Deck preview modal works with Export/Save buttons. Image generation endpoint accepts image_keyword parameter. Fixed theme detection priority to prefer 'health' over 'tech' for healthcare content.

issues: Preview shows text-based content (bullets, notes) rather than visual slide preview - acceptable for MVP

passed_tests: 1. GET /api/ - API root returns 200 with correct message
2. GET /api/sources - Returns 200 with 3 indexed sources available
4. Slides have varied layouts: title, image-left, image-right, bullets, timeline, two-column, quote
5. First slide layout is 'title' as required
7. All slides have required fields: slideNumber, title, bullets, layout, icon, imageKeyword
8. ImageKeywords are contextual (e.g., 'hospital patient monitoring', 'telehealth doctor patient')
9. POST /api/generate-image - Endpoint accepts image_keyword parameter and returns image data
10. Health theme correctly applied after fix (priority check for healthcare keywords)
11. Slides have meaningful content with 2+ bullets per slide
12. Frontend loads - Health Intelligence Workspace visible
13. Studio page accessible with all 9 tool cards (Audio, Slides, Video, Mind Map, Report, Flashcards, Quiz, Infographic, Data Table)
14. Generated Outputs section shows 7 outputs including Slide Deck
15. Slide Deck Preview modal opens correctly showing slide content
16. Export and Save buttons visible and clickable in preview modal
17. Slide generation shows toast 'Generating Slide Deck with AI...' during generation
critical_code_review_comments: Theme detection fix applied - health keywords now checked before tech keywords to ensure healthcare content gets proper theme
Slide preview modal shows text content rather than visual slide layout preview - this is acceptable for MVP but could be enhanced
PPTX download triggers image generation which may take 10-30 seconds per image - toast notification correctly warns users
seed_data_creation: Used existing sources: SOW-H@H, H@H Phased Scope, Slide Deck. Generated new slide decks via API for testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: PPTX generation tested and working. Backend generates 8-10 slides with varied layouts (title, bullets, image-left, image-right, timeline, two-column, quote). Image generation endpoint /api/generate-image works with image_keyword parameter. Frontend Studio shows all tools, preview modal works. Theme detection fixed to prioritize health keywords. Export flow triggers inline image generation with toast notification. Existing slide deck output visible at id: b206641f-a35c-4d5d-a...

fix_applied.description: Reordered theme detection to check 'health' keywords before 'tech' keywords. Added 'clinic', 'healthcare' to health keyword list.
fix_applied.reason: Healthcare content was being classified as 'tech' due to words like 'digital' appearing in sources. Now health-related content correctly gets 'health' theme.
